en: The name's Bond. Santa Bond.
Olive and eggnog, shaken, not stirred.
Santa, wonderful tradition. Everybody loves Santa.
ko: 산타, 멋진 전통이야. 다들 산타를 좋아해.

en: Everybody can't get enough of the jolly old man.
But that is a myth, because you know what?
He is not necessarily a big, fat guy with a beard.
ko: 꼭 뚱뚱하고 수염 난 사람이 아니거든.

en: He's not necessarily an old guy.
No one knows what the real Santa Claus... God!
Ow!
Just stop moving your calves so much while you're talking.
ko: 얘기할 때 종아리 좀 움직이지 마.

en: Well, this year's gonna be different.
We're gonna have fun. It's not gonna be tacky.
It's going to be... You know what?
The food is going to be austere.
Maybe I'll bring my boyfriend.
Okay. I'll invite him.
Sure.
I mean, unless there's any chance there could be press at this party.
ko: 파티에 기자가 올 수도 있는 거 아니면.

en: You never know about the press.
Well, I only ask because he's a senator.
Could he help us with some parking tickets?
I don't think that's appropriate.
Well, then he's not a senator.
